question: Q9
claim: gauge lag is S and DECOUPLED from C4-C (corrects iter-015/M8): durable post_insert_enrichment_status column (vector-index-schema.ts:1884-1885) + created_at + the existing health query (memory-crud-health.ts:902, already groups non-complete) give oldest-pending age = now - MIN(created_at) WHERE status != complete. pending/failed are S aliases over shipped state. C4-C cursor not required.

question: Q9
claim: Most-likely-wrong: created_at is an approximate staleness proxy - backfill re-marks rows pending without touching created_at so lag over-reports for recovered rows; a precise lag wants a one-line pending_at stamp on markEnrichmentPending (enrichment-state.ts:171-176), still S, still no cursor.
